query: SELECT u.id, u.name FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%Jake%' OR u.email LIKE '%jake%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3K2x4Mgy2RpvvVT.root --database HZf6zqYa94nKHY3YxXLHa5 --execute SELECT u.id, u.name FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%Jake%' OR u.email LIKE '%jake%';
